problem: What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants?
hypothesis: Bacteriophage surface display for targeting may resolve What material surface coating prevents bacterial biofilm formation on implants? by activating at the molecular level.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
